title: Q2 Operating Review
decision: choose the two operating interventions for Q3
prompt:
Create a seven-slide Q2 operating review for executives choosing two interventions for Q3. Use the supplied KPI and risk data exactly. Open with the operating verdict, show KPI movement, explain the conversion bottleneck, rank risks, compare intervention options, and close with owners and checkpoints. Include an editable KPI scorecard, trend chart, risk matrix, and decision slide. Keep copy terse and executive-readable.

Design direction: Use an evidence-led editorial direction: restrained surface treatment, decisive hierarchy, visible provenance, and an inspectable visual argument on every proof slide. Avoid card grids and decorative dashboards.
